data.description: List of data to be plotted as character values specifying multiple bigwig file paths, dataframes in BED format, or GenomicRanges GRanges objects with metadata column score

chrom.description: Chromosome of data region ragne as a string, if range for a specific chromosome is desired

chromstart.description: Integer start position on chromosome to get data range

chromend.description: Integer end position on chromosome to get data range

assembly.description: Default genome assembly as a string or a plotgardener assembly object

negData.description: A logical value indicating whether any of the data has both positive and negative scores and the signal range should be adjusted accordingly
